title: Test: Add fuzz testing
original_text: Added fuzz testing using AFL. Implemented fuzz testing for input parsing functions. Added fuzz testing for file format parsers. Implemented fuzz testing for network protocol handlers. Added fuzz test coverage and crash reporting. Result: no crashes found.
expected_subject: test(security): add fuzz testing with AFL
expected_body_lines: - Implement fuzz testing for input parsing functions
- Add fuzz testing for file format parsers
- Implement fuzz testing for network protocol handlers
- Add fuzz test coverage and crash reporting
expected_command: git commit -m "test(security): add fuzz testing with AFL"
